description: A committed, Obsidian-style codebase map for a project: brain/INDEX.md indexes areas, key files, and notable classes/entrypoints so a fresh Claude session starts oriented. A SessionStart hook injects the compact map (with a staleness hint when it lags HEAD); /brain reads it and /brain index builds/refreshes it. Map-only tracer (Phase 1a); an anchored-notes layer is planned. Nothing outside brain/ is ever modified.

reasons: out-of-band: install via install-agents.sh (Codex plugins cannot bundle subagents); model omitted (inherits session model)

interface.longDescription:
Committed, Obsidian-style codebase map: brain/INDEX.md indexes areas, key files, and notable classes/entrypoints so a fresh Claude session starts oriented. A SessionStart hook injects the compact map (with a staleness hint when it lags HEAD); /brain reads it, /brain <area> prints one area, /brain index builds or refreshes it. Reads code in place — nothing outside brain/ is modified. Map-only tracer (Phase 1a); an anchored-notes layer is planned. Includes /brain and an indexer agent.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 2 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
interface.shortDescription: A committed, Obsidian-style codebase map for a project: brain/INDEX.md indexes areas, key files, and notable classes/entrypoints so a fresh Claude session starts oriented. A SessionStart hook injects the compact map (with a staleness hint when it lags HEAD); /brain reads it and /brain index builds/refreshes it. Map-only tracer (Phase 1a); an anchored-notes layer is planned. Nothing outside brain/ is ever modified.

name: brain
